about-me-description: I am a Frontend Developer with a passion for modern web development and user-friendly interfaces. My focus is on building responsive web applications using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. After completing my training as an Application Developer, I continue to expand my knowledge through personal projects and new technologies. I work carefully, enjoy learning new things, and continuously improve my skills. I am currently deepening my expertise through a frontend development program at Developer Akademie, where I work extensively with modern frameworks such as Angular.
about-me-location-text: Available in the Ostallgäu region or remotely
about-me-cognition-text: I enjoy learning new things and embrace new challenges with enthusiasm.
about-me-releases-text: I approach challenges creatively and with a solution-oriented mindset, whether working independently or as part of a team.
skills-description: Here is an overview of the technologies and tools I work with. My main focus is developing modern web applications using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. At the same time, I continuously expand my knowledge of frameworks such as Angular and other modern web technologies.
skills-other-description: I learn new technologies quickly and continuously expand my skill set. If your project requires a specific technology or framework, I am always eager to learn and take on new challenges.
projects-description: Here you will find a selection of projects I developed during my frontend development program at Developer Akademie. Each project has helped me strengthen my frontend development skills.
recommendation-description-1: Working with him has always been a pleasure. He actively contributes to the team, listens carefully, and collaborates effectively to find the best solutions.
recommendation-description-2: I was especially impressed by his careful and well-structured way of working.
recommendation-description-3: He stands out for his strong motivation, quick understanding, and willingness to learn.
contact-description: Do you have any questions or are you interested in working together? I look forward to hearing from you and will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact-privacy: I have read the privacy policy and agree to the processing of my data as described.
contact-success: Thank you for your message! I will get back to you as soon as possible.
